Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('PIL ok'\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\('src/scenes/UIScene.js','src/scenes/GameScene.js','src/scenes/BootScene.js','src/entities/Shopkeeper.js','src/world/DungeonGenerator.js','src/world/Room.js','src/world/RoomManager.js','src/systems/EnemyManager.js','src/systems/AttackManager.js'\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "{0,3} {1}  \({2} bytes\)" -f $r.StatusCode, $p, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "ERR $p $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
